entries.name: idx_agents_team_lease
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_agents_team_lease ON agents(team_id, lease_expires_at)

entries.name: idx_agents_team_status
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_agents_team_status ON agents(team_id, status)

entries.name: idx_artifact_links_team_entity
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_artifact_links_team_entity ON artifact_links(team_id, entity_type, entity_id)

entries.name: idx_checkpoints_team_created
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_checkpoints_team_created ON recovery_checkpoints(team_id, created_at)

entries.name: idx_delegations_child_session
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_delegations_child_session ON delegations(child_session_id)

entries.name: idx_delegations_team_status
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_delegations_team_status ON delegations(team_id, status)

entries.name: idx_events_team_created
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_events_team_created ON runtime_events(team_id, created_at)

entries.name: idx_git_work_items_team_status
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_git_work_items_team_status ON git_work_items(team_id, status)

entries.name: idx_git_work_items_team_task
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_git_work_items_team_task ON git_work_items(team_id, task_id)

entries.name: idx_mailbox_team_recipient_status
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_mailbox_team_recipient_status ON mailbox_messages(team_id, recipient_agent, status)

entries.name: idx_mailbox_team_task
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_mailbox_team_task ON mailbox_messages(team_id, task_id)

entries.name: idx_tasks_team_claim_lease
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_team_claim_lease ON tasks(team_id, claim_lease_expires_at)

entries.name: idx_tasks_team_status
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_team_status ON tasks(team_id, status)

entries.name: agents
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE agents ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, agent_name TEXT NOT NULL, role TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, capabilities_json TEXT NOT NULL, last_heartbeat_at TEXT, lease_expires_at TEXT, current_task_id TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(team_id, agent_name), FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (current_task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL )

entries.name: artifact_links
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE artifact_links ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, entity_type TEXT NOT NULL, entity_id TEXT NOT NULL, artifact_system TEXT NOT NULL, artifact_kind TEXT NOT NULL, reference_id TEXT NOT NULL, uri TEXT, note TEXT, metadata_json TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE )

entries.name: delegations
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE delegations ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, task_id TEXT NOT NULL, source_agent TEXT NOT NULL, target_agent TEXT NOT NULL, prompt TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, result_summary TEXT, child_session_id TEXT, child_message_id TEXT, child_session_title TEXT, launch_error TEXT, launched_at TEXT, completed_at TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE )

entries.name: git_work_items
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE git_work_items ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, task_id TEXT NOT NULL, branch_name TEXT NOT NULL, base_branch TEXT NOT NULL, pr_target_branch TEXT NOT NULL, pr_number INTEGER, pr_url TEXT, commit_batching_mode TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(task_id), FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE )

entries.name: mailbox_messages
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE mailbox_messages ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, sender_agent TEXT NOT NULL, recipient_agent TEXT NOT NULL, task_id TEXT, delegation_id TEXT, message_type TEXT NOT NULL, subject TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, read_at TEXT, resolved_at TEXT, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, FOREIGN KEY (delegation_id) REFERENCES delegations(id) ON DELETE SET NULL )

entries.name: recovery_checkpoints
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE recovery_checkpoints ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, checkpoint_type TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE )

entries.name: runtime_events
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE runtime_events ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, entity_type TEXT NOT NULL, entity_id TEXT NOT NULL, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE )

entries.name: runtime_meta
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE runtime_meta ( key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL )

entries.name: tasks
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE tasks ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, team_id TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, priority TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, claimed_by TEXT, claim_lease_expires_at TEXT, depends_on_task_id TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL, block_reason TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (team_id) REFERENCES teams(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (depends_on_task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) )

entries.name: teams
entries.sql_normalized: CREATE TABLE teams ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, goal TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, branch_name TEXT, pr_target_branch TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL )
